title: Orbiting the camera — mid-drag state showing tilted view
capture_instructions: Queens Campus point cloud visible from a tilted angle (approximately 30–45 degrees from horizontal) that clearly shows orbit has been performed from the default top-down view. The View Cube in the bottom-right should show a matching tilted orientation. Use a composite or annotated image to show the middle mouse button being held (mouse icon overlay with middle button highlighted). The camera should be mid-orbit showing buildings from the side.
ui_state: Grab/Navigate mode active, mid-orbit view of Queens Campus, tilted perspective showing building facades

annotations.label: Point cloud — tilted orbit angle, building facades visible
View Cube — shows tilted orientation matching viewport
Drag direction — horizontal = yaw, vertical = pitch
